title: vitex negundo var. intermedia
intro: Vitex negundo var. intermedia, also known as the Chinese chaste tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as improved digestion and immune function. Vitex negundo var. intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
